title: Marksman Powder Free Vinyl Disposable Gloves, Medium 100 pieces
features: Latex free white vinyl disposable gloves which are also non-sterile and powder free can be used for general domestic light duty cleaning food handling and processing
Perfect Fit: Available in three different sizes (XL, L, and Medium), ensuring a perfect fit for every user, enhancing dexterity and comfort during use.
Bulk Quantity: Each box contains 100 pieces of disposable gloves, providing ample supply for extended use, whether at home or in professional settings.
Sleek Black Design: These vinyl disposable gloves boast a stylish white color, adding a modern touch to your cleaning or food handling routine while maintaining professionalism.

Multipurpose Protection: Ideal for general domestic tasks, light duty cleaning, food handling, and processing, these black vinyl disposable gloves provide versatile protection for various applications.
description: Made from soft stretch vinyl, which mould to the shape of your hand giving ultimate sensitivity and touch. Vinyl composition is recommneded as an alternative for people who are allergic to natural rubber. Ambidextrous- gloves fit either hand. Marksman Vinyl Gloves are non-sterile. Store in cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
